title: bromus hordeaceus subsp. parvispiculatus
intro: Bromus hordeaceus subsp. parvispiculatus, also known as meadow brome, is a subspecies of a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with meadow brome include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of meadow brome are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and skin irritations.
